class.name: DropTarget
class.signature: public class DropTarget extends Object implements DropTargetListener, Serializable
class.description: The DropTarget is associated with a Component when that Component wishes to accept drops during Drag and Drop operations. Each DropTarget is associated with a FlavorMap. The default FlavorMap hereafter designates the FlavorMap returned by SystemFlavorMap.getDefaultFlavorMap().

constructors.name: DropTarget
constructors.signature: public DropTarget(Component c, int ops, DropTargetListener dtl, boolean act, FlavorMap fm) throws HeadlessException
constructors.description: Creates a new DropTarget given the Component to associate itself with, an int representing the default acceptable action(s) to support, a DropTargetListener to handle event processing, a boolean indicating if the DropTarget is currently accepting drops, and a FlavorMap to use (or null for the default FlavorMap). The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: The Component with which this DropTarget is associated

parameters.name: ops
parameters.description: The default acceptable actions for this DropTarget

parameters.name: fm
parameters.description: The FlavorMap to use, or null for the default FlavorMap

constructors.name: DropTarget
constructors.signature: public DropTarget(Component c, int ops, DropTargetListener dtl, boolean act) throws HeadlessException
constructors.description: Creates a DropTarget given the Component to associate itself with, an int representing the default acceptable action(s) to support, a DropTargetListener to handle event processing, and a boolean indicating if the DropTarget is currently accepting drops. The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: The Component with which this DropTarget is associated

parameters.name: ops
parameters.description: The default acceptable actions for this DropTarget

constructors.name: DropTarget
constructors.signature: public DropTarget(Component c, DropTargetListener dtl) throws HeadlessException
constructors.description: Creates a DropTarget given the Component to associate itself with, and the DropTargetListener to handle event processing. The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: The Component with which this DropTarget is associated

constructors.name: DropTarget
constructors.signature: public DropTarget(Component c, int ops, DropTargetListener dtl) throws HeadlessException
constructors.description: Creates a DropTarget given the Component to associate itself with, an int representing the default acceptable action(s) to support, and a DropTargetListener to handle event processing. The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: The Component with which this DropTarget is associated

parameters.name: ops
parameters.description: The default acceptable actions for this DropTarget

methods.name: setComponent
methods.description: Note: this interface is required to permit the safe association of a DropTarget with a Component in one of two ways, either: component.setDropTarget(droptarget); or droptarget.setComponent(component); The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: The new Component this DropTarget is to be associated with.

methods.name: getComponent
methods.description: Gets the Component associated with this DropTarget.

methods.name: setDefaultActions
methods.description: Sets the default acceptable actions for this DropTarget

methods.name: getDefaultActions
methods.description: Gets an int representing the current action(s) supported by this DropTarget.

methods.name: setActive
methods.description: Sets the DropTarget active if true, inactive if false.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Reports whether or not this DropTarget is currently active (ready to accept drops).
methods.returns: true if active, false if not

methods.name: addDropTargetListener
methods.signature: public void addDropTargetListener(DropTargetListener dtl) throws TooManyListenersException
methods.description: Adds a new DropTargetListener (UNICAST SOURCE).

throws.description: if a DropTargetListener is already added to this DropTarget.

methods.name: removeDropTargetListener
methods.description: Removes the current DropTargetListener (UNICAST SOURCE).

methods.name: dragEnter
methods.description: Calls dragEnter on the registered DropTargetListener and passes it the specified DropTargetDragEvent. Has no effect if this DropTarget is not active.

throws.description: if this DropTarget is active and dtde is null

methods.name: dragOver
methods.description: Calls dragOver on the registered DropTargetListener and passes it the specified DropTargetDragEvent. Has no effect if this DropTarget is not active.

throws.description: if this DropTarget is active and dtde is null

methods.name: dropActionChanged
methods.description: Calls dropActionChanged on the registered DropTargetListener and passes it the specified DropTargetDragEvent. Has no effect if this DropTarget is not active.

throws.description: if this DropTarget is active and dtde is null

methods.name: dragExit
methods.description: Calls dragExit on the registered DropTargetListener and passes it the specified DropTargetEvent. Has no effect if this DropTarget is not active. This method itself does not throw any exception for null parameter but for exceptions thrown by the respective method of the listener.

methods.name: drop
methods.description: Calls drop on the registered DropTargetListener and passes it the specified DropTargetDropEvent if this DropTarget is active.

throws.description: if dtde is null and at least one of the following is true: this DropTarget is not active, or there is no a DropTargetListener registered.

methods.name: getFlavorMap
methods.description: Gets the FlavorMap associated with this DropTarget. If no FlavorMap has been set for this DropTarget, it is associated with the default FlavorMap.

methods.name: setFlavorMap
methods.description: Sets the FlavorMap associated with this DropTarget.

parameters.name: fm
parameters.description: the new FlavorMap, or null to associate the default FlavorMap with this DropTarget.

methods.name: addNotify
methods.description: Notify the DropTarget that it has been associated with a Component This method is usually called from java.awt.Component.addNotify() of the Component associated with this DropTarget to notify the DropTarget that a ComponentPeer has been associated with that Component. Calling this method, other than to notify this DropTarget of the association of the ComponentPeer with the Component may result in a malfunction of the DnD system.

methods.name: removeNotify
methods.description: Notify the DropTarget that it has been disassociated from a Component This method is usually called from java.awt.Component.removeNotify() of the Component associated with this DropTarget to notify the DropTarget that a ComponentPeer has been disassociated with that Component. Calling this method, other than to notify this DropTarget of the disassociation of the ComponentPeer from the Component may result in a malfunction of the DnD system.

methods.name: getDropTargetContext
methods.description: Gets the DropTargetContext associated with this DropTarget.
methods.returns: the DropTargetContext associated with this DropTarget.

methods.name: createDropTargetContext
methods.description: Creates the DropTargetContext associated with this DropTarget. Subclasses may override this method to instantiate their own DropTargetContext subclass. This call is typically *only* called by the platform's DropTargetContextPeer as a drag operation encounters this DropTarget. Accessing the Context while no Drag is current has undefined results.
methods.returns: the DropTargetContext associated with this DropTarget

methods.name: createDropTargetAutoScroller
methods.signature: protected DropTarget.DropTargetAutoScroller createDropTargetAutoScroller(Component c, Point p)
methods.description: create an embedded autoscroller

methods.name: initializeAutoscrolling
methods.description: initialize autoscrolling

methods.name: updateAutoscroll
methods.description: update autoscrolling with current cursor location

methods.name: clearAutoscroll
methods.description: clear autoscrolling
